row.expresion: str( FACTTIPO, 2, 0) + FLETRA + str( FPTOVEN, 4, 0) + str( FNUMCOMP, 8, 0)

str( FACTTIPO, 2, 0) + FLETRA + str( FPTOVEN, 4, 0) + str( FNUMCOMP, 8, 0)
